dismissalText.commentary: Travis Head c Sameer Rizvi b Patel 37 (26b 2x4 2x6 39m) SR: 142.3

dismissalComment.html: he's smashed this straight to Rizvi at deep midwicket! It was a drag-down from Axar, and Head rocked back to pull , didn't hit it well enough to clear the boundary and found the fielder ... the players are taking a time out at the fall of the wicket

dismissalText.commentary: David Miller b Malinga 0 (1b 0x4 0x6) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: golden duck for Miller! Pitches just short of a length around leg and slants it across the left-hander from over the wicket, Miller stays in his crease and closes the face of the bat, the ball kisses the inside edge and hits middle and leg stump

dismissalText.commentary: Tristan Stubbs c Sakib Hussain b Malinga 27 (16b 3x4 1x6) SR: 168.75
